name: Summertime's Bounty Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 each Env. Soup Mix  (Onion, Onion-Mushroom or Beefy Onion)
8 oz Sour Cream or Plain Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose one of the following soup mixes to use in the recipe: Onion, Onion-Mushroom, or Beefy Onion.
2. Combine the ground beef and soup mix in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Add bread crumbs, sour cream or yogurt, egg, thyme or basil leaves, flour, cheddar cheese, and hot cooked veggies to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into a pie dish lined with parchment paper.
5. Cover the top with foil and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before baking.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before serving.
